Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vulns=d.get\('vulnerabilities',{}\); [print\(k, v['severity'], v.get\('via',[]\)[0] if isinstance\(v.get\('via',[]\)[0], str\) else v.get\('via',[]\)[0].get\('title',''\)\) for k,v in vulns.items\(\)]")
